environment.target: production DB (OVH VPS guvfx-ubuntu 100.119.23.29, guvfx-backend container)

expected_results: Target = user nuno.amaral@live.com (id 2), TradingAccount #1 'TradersWay Demo (1121106)' (is_demo, is_active).
The 3 existing MANUAL assignments on account #1 (WIMS Demo Strategy, Structural Continuation Engine, TBP V3 Hybrid Sleeve v1) are deactivated (is_active=False), NOT deleted.
Exactly one Strategy 'Wayond Auto Demo' and one StrategyAssignment (account #1, execution_mode=AUTO_DEMO, stage=LIVE, is_active=True) — the unique active AUTO_DEMO target.
SignalSourceConfig(source=wayond, auto_demo_execution_enabled=True, total_lot_target=0.06 = the current MAX_TOTAL_LOT_PER_SIGNAL cap; NOT 0.40).
Safety defaults unchanged: ExecutionControl.auto_execution_enabled=False, signal_execution_mode=SHADOW, provider wayond=ONBOARDING (un-armed), NOTIFICATION_DISPATCH_ENABLED off.
No new ExecutionJobs, no orders placed, no Telegram sent.
actual_results: BEFORE: asg#1 (WIMS Demo, MANUAL, active), asg#5 (Structural Continuation, MANUAL, active), asg#6 (TBP V3, MANUAL, active). No AUTO_DEMO assignment, no Wayond strategy/source-config, parser cert LOW.

WRITES (one atomic transaction): deactivated 3 assignments; created Strategy #7 'Wayond Auto Demo'; created StrategyAssignment #7 (AUTO_DEMO, LIVE, active); created SignalSourceConfig(wayond, auto_demo=True, total_lot_target=0.06); set parser wayond_v1 cert MEDIUM.
AFTER: acct#1 assignments = asg#1/#5/#6 is_active=False (preserved, ids intact) + asg#7 Wayond AUTO_DEMO active. ACTIVE on acct#1 = [('Wayond Auto Demo','AUTO_DEMO')] only.
Unique active AUTO_DEMO (demo/LIVE) globally = 1 (satisfies the auto-router uniqueness requirement).
wayond SignalSourceConfig: auto_demo_execution_enabled=True, total_lot_target=0.06. parser wayond_v1 cert=MEDIUM.
Safety: auto_execution_enabled=False; signal_execution_mode=SHADOW; provider wayond=ONBOARDING; NOTIFICATION_DISPATCH_ENABLED absent (OFF).
ExecutionJob total = 50 (unchanged from baseline); Wayond-tagged jobs = 0. No order, no Telegram send.
limitations: Config-only production DB change (reversible). No code, no deploy, no migration. Nothing armed: provider ONBOARDING, auto_execution_enabled False, signal_execution_mode SHADOW, dispatch OFF, transport not deployed. E3 remains RED.

total_lot_target is set to 0.06 (the current MAX_TOTAL_LOT_PER_SIGNAL) — split_volume(0.06, 3) yields 0.02/0.02/0.02 for a 3-TP Wayond signal, within all current caps. The 0.40 target is deferred to a post-demo lot-cap packet.

Arm-time considerations for the eventual demo (NOT this packet): at 0.06 the symbol-exposure runtime cap (MAX_SYMBOL_EXPOSURE_LOT default 0.06) is at its boundary, and a 3-leg signal approaches MAX_OPEN_POSITIONS_PER_ACCOUNT (default 3) — the arm/preflight packet should confirm/tune these env caps.

The 'Wayond Auto Demo' Strategy carries no scheduler trading logic (no entry/indicator rules), so the h1/m5/h4 strategy schedulers produce no orders from it; the deactivated strategies produce none either — the demo account is quiet until the signal path is armed.
artefact_locations: prod DB: strategies_strategy #7 'Wayond Auto Demo'; strategies_strategyassignment #7 (AUTO_DEMO); execution_signalsourceconfig source=wayond; signal_intake_parserprofile wayond_v1
